title: Fights Dirty
summary: You’ll do anything to win a fight: bite, scratch, kick, trick, and worse.
tiers: Tier 6: Twisting the Knife or Murderer
gm_intrusions: People look poorly upon those who cheat or fight without honor. Sometimes a dirty trick backfires.
text: You’ll do anything to win a fight: bite, scratch, kick, trick, and worse.
details: You’ll do anything to win a fight: bite, scratch, kick, trick, and worse.
